description: A vertical 'Labor News' graphic combining a photograph with a headline overlay. The photo is a low-angle shot of the bow of a large cargo ship (dark hull above a red-painted lower hull) in a dry dock or shipyard, with gantry structures at left and an overcast sky. A faint watermark of the circular Department of Labor seal ('...ARTMENT OF...') is over the lower portion of the image. At the bottom left, a blue tab with white italic text reads 'LABOR NEWS' (with three short vertical bars), beneath which a bold white serif headline states 'US Department of Labor eases regulatory burden for vital industries, protecting workers & cutting costs.' The lower right has 'DOL.GOV' in white.
notable_text: LABOR NEWS / US Department of Labor eases regulatory burden for vital industries, protecting workers & cutting costs / DOL.GOV
